{{Quote|The Muskeg are Gungans. A sect of Gungans, to be more precise. They believe that Gungans are the predominant species on Naboo.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Sundria Khartoor|Khartoor]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:CaEM" />}}
The '''Muskegs''' were a fanatical and violent religious group of [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]], situated on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They were in conflict with the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo people]] as they believed that Gungans should be the only sentient species allowed to inhabit Naboo.<ref name="SWG:CaEM" />

==History==
{{Quote|Oh, great. More people wanting to talk. Just like those Gungans that came by not long ago. The Muskeg, I think they called themselves. Came by asking about my son Hunnos just before he escaped.|[[Ados Jarkey]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FaEM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Find an Escaped Murderer|Naboo}}</ref>}}
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> they tried to recruit the wanted murderer [[Hunnos Jarkey]] to assassinate members of the [[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo human government]] but the latter refused. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Sundria Khartoor|Khartoor]] of the [[Royal Security Police Force|Violent Crimes Division]] later tasked [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|RSF]] agents to investigate [[Dubbin Sharr]]'s group of Muskegs fanatics near [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].<ref name="SWG:CaEM" />

[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] later sent a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to recover a Gungan artifact that they had stolen from him. The spacer fought several Muskeg anarchists, extremists and reactionaries in the [[Lasay Swamp]]; and finally recovered the artifact from [[Flossin Noz]], a Muskeg zealot chief.<ref name="SWG:RtGAsbtM" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Muskegs appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:RtGAsbtM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Muskegs were added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
